freeze_basis: Pre-screen only: existing project landscape/full-text reports, official project documentation, repository metadata, and remote HEAD resolution. No deep candidate source review and no candidate result inspection occurred before this freeze.
freeze_rule: Audit exactly the three included candidates in frozen_order. Do not replace one after seeing evidence, and do not add a fourth candidate.

candidates.structure_type: Native event/message routing with typed handlers, topic subscriptions, and delivery-stage event logging
candidates.pin_source: git ls-remote origin HEAD on 2026-07-22 before deep review
candidates.inclusion_reason: Open source and commit-pinnable; official Core runtime uses serializable messages, direct and publish/subscribe delivery, typed handlers, explicit message IDs, and MessageEvent send/deliver records. Official examples contain concrete runtime output and do not require this audit to run a model.
expected_source: AutoGen Core message envelope/runtime publish and deliver paths
expected_trace: Committed official Core documentation/examples with publish/subscribe runtime output
Committed runtime logging tests or fixtures for MessageEvent send/deliver records
Official AgentChat/Core sample event streams if stored at the pinned commit
candidates.prescreen_risk: Documentation examples may show delivery but not preserve message IDs in a machine-readable public trace; if so, evidence remains code-only. Broadcast may also be full-artifact Q0/Q1 rather than projection.

candidates.structure_type: Structured state/dataflow with native Send packets carrying custom downstream state and checkpoint/task/debug streams
candidates.pin_source: git ls-remote origin HEAD on 2026-07-22 before deep review
candidates.inclusion_reason: Open source and commit-pinnable; the official Graph API defines typed state, native Send packets whose downstream state can differ from the graph state, dynamic map fan-out, and public structured checkpoint/task/debug examples. These permit a no-model static and existing-trace audit.
expected_source: raw shared-state access and bypass paths
expected_trace: Committed official map-reduce Send example output
Committed checkpoint/task/debug stream examples with task IDs and inputs
Pinned documentation fixtures or snapshots generated by the ordinary runtime
candidates.prescreen_risk: Send examples may fan out only repeated instances of one node, and the runtime may expose complete shared state through a bypass. Public docs output may be illustrative rather than an archived machine-readable trace.

candidates.structure_type: Public SWE/code-agent trajectories with explicit attempt, reviewer/score, and chooser meta-agent paths
candidates.pin_source: git ls-remote origin HEAD on 2026-07-22 before deep review
candidates.inclusion_reason: Open source and commit-pinnable; official source documentation exposes RetryAgent attempts, ReviewSubmission routing, ScoreRetryLoop/ChooserRetryLoop paths, and JSON trajectory serialization. Official repositories publish .traj artifacts, allowing inspection without running an agent.
expected_source: attempt trajectory creation and stable attempt identity
chooser input assembly and best-attempt selection
history processor and raw-trajectory bypass paths
expected_trace: Committed RetryAgent/Reviewer/Chooser test fixtures or example trajectories
Official SWE-bench/SWE-agent public trajectories only if bound to a compatible source version
candidates.prescreen_risk: Public demonstration trajectories may cover only the default single-agent loop rather than a RetryAgent review/choice path. Score and chooser may be alternative, not simultaneous, consumers.

candidates.exclusion_reason: Existing frozen negative-evidence review already establishes a single fixed consumer and no native fan-out for the relevant trajectory path. Reopening it would repeat a known testbed mismatch.

candidates.structure_type: Stateful tool-use benchmark and outcome/milestone evaluator
candidates.exclusion_reason: It supplies state and outcome-oracle semantics but not a native producer artifact with two downstream agent consumers or a consumer-specific delivery/access path. It remains contextual C3 evidence, not a selective-consumption candidate.

Frozen historical counterevidence only. Its relevant path required a custom multi-layer harness, repeatedly failed before scientific execution, and is explicitly forbidden as a target for repair or new evidence generation.
